---
title: "Policies"
listing:
  - id: policies
    contents: "resources/policies/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: html/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: templates
    contents: "resources/templates/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: html/listing.ejs
page-layout: full
include-back-link: false
toc-location: right

---

INvenTree projects are expected to adhere to the following policies. These policies are intended to ensure that our work is conducted in an ethical, inclusive, and responsible manner, and that it aligns with our values and goals as a community.

## Policies

:::{#policies}
:::

## Templates

:::{#templates}
:::
